attributes.action: Reverse the decsion to the changes on the Motability Hire Package.
attributes.additional_details: Unjustly unfair and causing more hardship and worry to Motability Clients
attributes.background: Reverse the Chancellors decision to add taxes to the Motabity Hire package causing unjust excess payments.

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open asking for this, which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752400
